html:
Exclusive to:

A Buoy is a Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC that can be crafted from the Nautical tab. It requires an Empty Bottle, 4 Bamboo and 2 Bioluminescence to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can be placed on the Ocean in order to mark a location or to provide light. When placed, it provides as much light as a Torch, and does not require refueling.

Buoys have visible Map icons. When they are destroyed by being Hammered or by being hit by a Dragoon Egg during a Volcano eruption, they will drop an Empty Bottle, 2 Bamboo, and 1 Bioluminescence.

Trivia

  • Buoys were introduced in the Wilbur Vs. The Volcano update.

Gallery

  • A Buoy at Day.
  • A Buoy at Dusk.
  • A Buoy at Night.
Craftable ItemsStructures

–Woodlegs

–Wormwood

–Wheeler
A Buoy is a Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC that can be crafted from the Nautical tab. It requires an Empty Bottle, 4 Bamboo and 2 Bioluminescence to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can be placed on the Ocean in order to mark a location or to provide light. When placed, it provides as much light as a Torch, and does not require refueling.
Buoys have visible Map icons. When they are destroyed by being Hammered or by being hit by a Dragoon Egg during a Volcano eruption, they will drop an Empty Bottle, 2 Bamboo, and 1 Bioluminescence.

A '''Buoy''' is a Structure introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC that can be crafted from the [[Nautical]] tab. It requires an [[Empty Bottle]], 4 [[Bamboo]] and 2 [[Bioluminescence]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It can be placed on the [[Ocean]] in order to mark a location or to provide light. When placed, it provides as much light as a [[Torch]], and does not require [[Fire#Fuel|refueling]].

Buoys have visible [[Map]] icons. When they are destroyed by being [[Hammer]]ed or by being hit by a [[Dragoon Egg]] during a [[Volcano/Object|Volcano]] eruption, they will drop an Empty Bottle, 2 Bamboo, and 1 Bioluminescence.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Buoys were introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#February 4th, 2016 - Wilbur Vs. The Volcano Update|Wilbur Vs. The Volcano]]'' update.
